_meta.adr: ADR-037 modular manifest fragment — never edit src/manifest.json
_meta.description: Learning group landing dashboard (nav-restructure-dashboards, supersedes ADR-044 cards-collapse): GroupLearning is BOTH navigable (lands on the LearningDashboard domain dashboard) AND collapsible (its six leaves render as nav sub-children — no longer in menu-layout.json#removals). CnAppNav renders a parent with a route + visible children as navigable-and-collapsible natively.
